subcodes.first_line: O thou twig, who hath excelled in propagating the Word of God! From what hath been heard, thou didst travel from Baghdad to Samarra
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع المتدرج فی اعلاء کلمه الله از قرار مسموع از بغداد عزیمت بصفحات سر
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @The Holy Spirit, @firmness in the Covenant
